action.command: for f in /workspace/YatCC/build/test/task1/functional-*/0*/answer.txt /workspace/YatCC/build/test/task1/llm-*/0*/answer.txt /workspace/YatCC/build/test/task1/mini-*/0*/answer.txt /workspace/YatCC/build/test/task1/performance/*/answer.txt; do cat "$f" 2>/dev/null; done | grep -oP "^[a-z_]+" | sort -u
